name: DATS Uniform
effect: +1 to all Ironclad skill rolls while equipped. The uniform is durable enough for Digital World field conditions. Wearing it in human-world contexts gives +2 to official interactions with DATS-affiliated personnel. Wearing it in the Digital World gives NPCs a reason to either respect you or target you, depending on what they think of DATS.
notes: +1 Ironclad. +2 to official DATS interactions in human world (conditional).
